message:
Capture goroutine dump before restarting unhealthy Dolt server

Send SIGQUIT to the Dolt server before stopping it on health check,
read-only, or identity check failure. Per Tim Sehn: kill -QUIT dumps
all goroutine stacks to stderr (redirected to server log), showing
what the server was stuck on. Dump is captured in all three failure
paths in EnsureRunning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
